BOME Of Meme

Introducing the BOME OF MEME: an experimental project poised to redefine web3 culture...

The Book of Meme (BOME) token, created by the artist behind Pepe, Darkfarms, has surged 20 times in three hours. This remarkable increase has propelled the crypto asset’s market value to $1.24 billion.

The proposal to airdrop BOME tokens to active users across multiple chains has been approved by the BOME community. Please click below to claim your BOME..
